design_decisions.choice: Advisory exit code 3 — distinct from the hard-fail exit 1 used by deps/touchpoints/ac/trace and the I/O error exit 2.
design_decisions.rationale: Spec requires an advisory code distinct from hard fail-closed of S29/S30; pin 1 chose exit 3 to avoid collapsing with I/O errors (exit 2).

design_decisions.choice: Grep against the repo working tree (not git-tracked-only) via grep -r excluding docs/.
design_decisions.rationale: Matches spec's 'live codebase' intent; git grep would miss untracked generated files.

design_decisions.choice: Extract from design.md only, not spec.md.
design_decisions.rationale: Evidence rows (§3a #3) all involve design-phase symbol errors; spec.md backticks are often AC lines and file paths, not code symbols.

design_decisions.choice: Conservative symbol shape regex: CamelCase/dotted pattern + snake_case pattern (multi-underscore only; single-word lowercase intentionally excluded).
design_decisions.rationale: Spec warns about over-extraction; this regex pair catches known evidence classes while avoiding CLI flags and prose backticks.

design_decisions.choice: state.Read for status metadata, os.ReadFile for design.md.
design_decisions.rationale: Follow existing CheckDeps/CheckTouchpoints pattern: state package for status.json, direct OS reads for slice documents.
